etimesEver wondered why temples have red and white stripes? The meaning might surprise youA foreign traveler's social media post shed light on the common red and white stripes adorning Indian temple walls. These colors, often overlooked, symbolize the harmonious union of feminine (red) and masculine (white) energies, representing balance. This revelation sparked widespread interest, reminding many of the profound meanings embedded in everyday cultural details.
